text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I've come out to watch some<n>scrimmages, and
while I'm waiting for<n>the next one to start...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Excuse me. May I ask you for some<n>advice?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I have checked the weather and<n>track
conditions and reviewed my<n>opponent's records
to see where<n>they usually make their move...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I have also planned different<n>positions to take
during the race so I<n>can handle any and all
unforeseen<n>circumstances.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
One would think my preparations for<n>this race are
more than sufficient, yet<n>something still feels
amiss...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
If it means I can increase my chances<n>of winning
by even one percent, then I<n>want to explore that
possibility as<n>thoroughly as possible.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
What do you think is the most<n>important thing to
do before a race? I<n>would appreciate your
thoughts.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I do that already, of course... Wait, are<n>you saying
I should train even more?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I see. One must train until the very last<n>moment.
All this time, my resolve was<n>lacking. You've
opened my eyes to a<n>new perspective.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I suppose the best I can do now is<n>some weight
training. I will go to the<n>gym immediately!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
In any case, warming up my body<n>shouldn't do
me any harm.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for the advice. Now, if<n>you'll excuse
me.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I never fail to do that in the first place.<n>
Comparative research is vital to<n>discussions.
Past race analysis and—

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Wait... You mean I should watch the<n>races
immediately before my own? I<n>do need to
understand the turf<n>condition for my calculations...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But I won't be able to view them<n>from different
angles. I should ask<n>permission to go up the
watchtower...<n>No, that's going too far.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Oh, forgive me for ignoring you. I<n>appreciate your
input on the matter.<n>I'm sure it will be of great
use.
